name: Tappx
description: Cross-platform ad monetization and user acquisition for app developers with SDK, parallel bidding, and cross-promo.

seo.title: Tappx — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Tappx: Cross-platform ad monetization and user acquisition for app developers with SDK, parallel bidding, and cross-promo.

when_to_use: Cross-promo user acquisition via Tappx exchange for indie apps
Parallel bidding SDK for app monetization alongside mediation
Interstitial and banner ad monetization for mobile app publishers

cons: Demand depends on RTB partner quality
Support is primarily EU business hours
review.verdict: Underrated indie-friendly monetization suite, especially the free cross-promo tools.
review.best_for: Indie and mid-size app developers wanting mediation plus cross-promo in one place.
review.not_for: Top-100 publishers needing maximum direct-sold demand and enterprise SLAs.
